Emotionally Healthy

-- 3 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Why the heck should you care
about this??
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Because in order to manage the
mental state of others you must
first master it within yourself.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
People do not leave jobs they
leave BOSSES, and that starts
with you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
You will not attract fulfilled,
motivated, emotionally stable
people IF YOU ARE NOT.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
1.) Understand Our Emotions
a. Name, Feel, Identify
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
1.) Understand Our Emotions
a. Name, Feel, Identify
b. Most of us use generic terms like FINE
GOOD BAD TIRED
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
1.) Understand Our Emotions
a. Name, Feel, Identify
b. Most of us use generic terms like FINE
GOOD BAD TIRED
c. In order to identify it you must sit long
enough with it to uncover it
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
2.) Allow those Emotions
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
2.) Allow those Emotions
a. Allow yourself to feel something
without fear/resistance
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
2.) Allow those Emotions
a. Allow yourself to feel something
without fear/resistance
b. Your job is not to tell someone how
you feel, but to LET YOURSELF FEEL
IT
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
2.) Allow those Emotions
a. Allow yourself to feel something
without fear/resistance
b. Your job is not to tell someone how
you feel, but to LET YOURSELF FEEL
IT
c. Emotions will not kill you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
2.) Allow those Emotions
a. Allow yourself to feel something
without fear/resistance
b. Your job is not to tell someone how
you feel, but to LET YOURSELF FEEL
IT
c. Emotions will not kill you
d. You can feel something without
reacting
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
There are emotions
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
There are emotions
….And then there are choices
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
It is your choice to react to an
emotion
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Emotion
DOES NOT EQUAL
Reaction
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Emotions are not tied to
circumstance.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
What one person does is not
responsible for how YOU feel.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Nobody “makes” you feel
anything. You choose to feel it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Can you be at peace and
content KNOWING you will not
be at peace and content
majority of the time?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
It is OKAY and HUMAN to not be
happy all of the time and to
experience emotions.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 26 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Resisting emotions and stone
walling everyone and everything
is the surest way to feel worse
than those who allow
themselves emotion.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 27 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
3.) Not Indulging in Emotions
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 28 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
3.) Not Indulging in Emotions
a. Indulgent emotions keep you stuck
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 29 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
3.) Not Indulging in Emotions
a. Indulgent emotions keep you stuck
b. You replay the same scenario over and
over again
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 30 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
3.) Not Indulging in Emotions
a. Indulgent emotions keep you stuck
b. You replay the same scenario over and
over again
c. We indulge in the familiar negative
emotion because we are afraid of
feeling something negative yet
unfamiliar
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 31 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
If you’re going to feel a negative
emotion you mind as well make
it a productive one.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 32 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Example:
You can have the negative
emotion of feeling bad because
you are overweight, or have the
negative emotion of discomfort
trying to lose weight
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 33 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Example 2:
You aren’t hitting your quota so
you dwell on how bad it makes
you feel instead of the new
emotion of discomfort when you
TAKE ACTION to change it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 34 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Both feel bad, but at least one
leads to a productive outcome.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 35 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
4.) Don’t hide from Emotions
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 36 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
4.) Don’t hide from Emotions
a. Avoidance of situations because of
fear of the feelings that will come with
it
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 37 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
4.) Don’t hide from Emotions
a. Avoidance of situations because of
fear of the feelings that will come with
it
b. Confidence comes from the
willingness to feel any emotion.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 38 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
4.) Don’t hide from Emotions
a. Avoidance of situations because of
fear of the feelings that will come with
it
b. Confidence comes from the
willingness to feel any emotion.
c. Surest way to be unhappy is to
constantly try to be happy and not
confront how you feel
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 39 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Again, you feel like shit avoiding
these emotions and you feel like
shit not avoiding them so you
mind as well make it productive.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 40 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
There is a difference between
being strong and being numb.
Choose wisely.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 41 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
5.) Create Emotion on Purpose
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 42 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
5.) Create Emotion on Purpose
a. You understand that only YOU can
generate your emotions
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 43 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
5.) Create Emotion on Purpose
a. You understand that only YOU can
generate your emotions
b. Thoughts -> Emotions
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 44 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
5.) Create Emotion on Purpose
a. You understand that only YOU can
generate your emotions
b. Thoughts -> Emotions
c. You can create the emotion you want
to feel ON PURPOSE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 45 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
5.) Create Emotion on Purpose
a. You understand that only YOU can
generate your emotions
b. Thoughts -> Emotions
c. You can create the emotion you want
to feel ON PURPOSE
d. This does not mean you should or will
be happy all the time.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 46 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
If you want to generate a better
emotion, than you need to think
better thoughts.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 47 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
If you want to change who you
are, you need to change the
thoughts you think.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 48 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
Just like getting strong happens
from lifting day in and day out,
getting mentally strong comes
from INTENTIONAL THINKING
day in and day out
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 49 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
So...how does one go about
doing this, tactically?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 50 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
In order to do ANY of these
practices, you need to take the
first step of creating the space
in your life to address it.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 51 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
You need to be able to spend
time alone, without a computer
or phone, where you can sit and
think.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 52 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
You need time to be alone with
your thoughts. Because you
cannot change what you do not
understand.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 53 of 54 --

Building Emotional Intelligence
You must first seek to
understand your mind and the
thoughts it habitually creates.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 54 of 54 --
